    Interface IVertexSkinning

    Represents the interface that must be implemented by a skinning vertex fragment.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry.VertexTypes
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public interface IVertexSkinning
    Remarks

    Implemented by:

    Properties

    Name Description
    JointsHigh

    Gets the indices of the next 4 joints, if supported.
    JointsLow

    Gets the indices of the first 4 joints.
    MaxBindings

    Gets the Number of valid joints supported.
    Typical values are 0, 4 or 8.
    WeightsHigh

    Gets the weights of the next 4 joints, if supported.
    WeightsLow

    Gets the weights of the first 4 joints.

    Methods

    Name Description
    GetBinding(int)

    Gets a joint-weight pair.
    GetBindings()

    Gets the packed joints-weights.
    SetBindings(in SparseWeight8)
    SetBindings(params (int Index, float Weight)[])

    Sets the packed joints-weights.

    ⚠️ USE ONLY ON UNBOXED VALUES ⚠️
